records.ety: [OE. bimenen, AS. bem<?/nan; pref. be- + mǣnan to moan. See Moan.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Bemoaned (<?/); p. pr. & vb. n. Bemoaning.]

defs: To express deep grief for by moaning; to express sorrow for; to lament; to bewail; to pity or sympathize with.
quotes: Implores their pity, and his pain bemoans.
